channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Get Your Act Together with Aparna Nancherla
item.description:
Aparna Nancherla discusses her paradoxical relationship with performing and the catharsis of comedy.

Duration: 08:12

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, aparna nancherla, mental health, anxiety, observational comedy, whimsy, cozy, eliza skinner, behind the scenes

item.title: Demi Adejuyigbe: Is Going to Do One (1) Backflip
item.description:
Demi Adejuyigbe explores authenticity through original songs, comedic bits, and a single backflip.

Duration: 1:11:57

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, demi adejuyigbe, variety show, ted talks, singing, dancing, stunts, absurd, existentialism, jocelyn deboer, addie weyrich, alix bloom, leonard smith jr., geordie kieffer
